roles.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Designed and implemented data pipelines to ingest real-time position data via Kafka and integrate position snapshots from Bloomberg, enriched with security master reference data for risk monitoring
Implemented throttled live price ingestion for UST bonds, bond futures, and SOFR futures via ZeroMQ, enabling low-latency real-time risk and P&L calculations

Designed and implemented an event-driven trade reconciliation feature to validate consistency between E-Trading and Bloomberg-derived trade data, comparing Kafka events across systems and publishing mismatch alerts for downstream monitoring
Built a real-time configurable price ladder by merging market and volume-at-price (VAP) data with trader quantities for UST bonds and futures using Orion Pipeline and Stream
Designed and implemented a client-contact-salesperson onboarding and management system using Spring Boot and PostgreSQL in collaboration with cross-functional teams
Performed integration and regression testing for microservices using JUnit 5, AssertJ, and Awaitility in a WebSocket-based architecture
Managed service pod lifecycle and deployment using Kubernetes and OpenShift for scalable delivery

roles.title: Software Application Engineer
bullets: Standardized project workflows using Agile/Scrum methodology
Managed deployment and maintenance of Weblink software using Docker
Implemented RESTful APIs for Weblink Software using Golang
